---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
include-before-body: assets/partials/hero.html
---

```{=html}
<section class="section section-alt">
  <div class="container-md">
    <span class="section-label">Expertise</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">What I Do</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Combining rigorous survey methodology with modern data science tools to produce reproducible, policy-relevant research for India.</p>
    <div class="card-grid fade-up">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">📊</div><div class="card-title">Statistical Analysis</div><p class="card-desc">Advanced econometric modelling, hypothesis testing, regression, and causal inference using R and Python on Indian survey microdata.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-blue">R</span><span class="tag tag-teal">Econometrics</span><span class="tag tag-slate">Python</span></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">📋</div><div class="card-title">Survey Research</div><p class="card-desc">End-to-end survey operations — questionnaire design, ODK/SurveyCTO digital data collection, CAPI protocols, and field quality assurance.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-blue">ODK</span><span class="tag tag-teal">SurveyCTO</span><span class="tag tag-amber">CAPI</span></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">🎨</div><div class="card-title">Data Visualisation</div><p class="card-desc">Publication-quality charts with ggplot2, interactive ggiraph, Shiny dashboards, and reproducible Quarto reports for web and print.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-blue">ggplot2</span><span class="tag tag-teal">ggiraph</span><span class="tag tag-amber">Shiny</span></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">🏛️</div><div class="card-title">Indian Economic Data</div><p class="card-desc">PLFS, NSS, Union Budget, MOSPI, and DGCI&S datasets. Deep expertise in agricultural, labour market, fiscal, and trade analytics.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-blue">PLFS</span><span class="tag tag-amber">Budget</span><span class="tag tag-teal">Trade</span></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">🔄</div><div class="card-title">Reproducible Research</div><p class="card-desc">Fully documented pipelines with version control, Quarto books/websites, and APA-formatted academic publications from a single source.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-blue">Quarto</span><span class="tag tag-slate">Git</span><span class="tag tag-teal">RMarkdown</span></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-icon">🌐</div><div class="card-title">Web Scraping & Automation</div><p class="card-desc">Automated data collection from government portals using Python Selenium, rvest, and Bash scripts for Linux-based workflow automation.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-slate">Selenium</span><span class="tag tag-teal">rvest</span><span class="tag tag-blue">Bash</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section">
  <div class="container-md">
    <span class="section-label">Portfolio</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Recent Work</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">A selection of recent analysis, data journalism, and open-source R tools.</p>
    <div class="card-grid-2 fade-up">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="tag-list" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:.9rem;"><span class="tag tag-blue">Article</span><span class="tag tag-amber">Trade · Economy</span></div>
        <div class="card-title">India's Trade Story: Exports, Imports, and Deficits</div>
        <p class="card-desc">A data-driven analysis of India's merchandise trade trajectory — interactive ggiraph charts and gt tables from HS code classified DGCI&S data 1997–2025.</p>
        <a href="article.html" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;margin-top:1rem;font-size:.83rem;color:#2563eb;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;">Read article →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="tag-list" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:.9rem;"><span class="tag tag-teal">Blog</span><span class="tag tag-slate">Data Viz · ggplot2</span></div>
        <div class="card-title">Combining Plots in ggplot2: patchwork, gridExtra, cowplot</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Practical guide to arranging multiple ggplot2 panels into publication-quality figures using three popular R packages — with working code for every approach.</p>
        <a href="blog.html" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;margin-top:1rem;font-size:.83rem;color:#2563eb;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;">Read post →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section section-dark">
  <div class="container-md">
    <span class="section-label section-label-light">R Ecosystem</span>
    <h2 class="section-title section-title-light">Core R Toolkit</h2>
    <p class="section-desc section-desc-light">The packages and workflows I use daily for Indian economic research.</p>
    <div class="card-grid fade-up">
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">⚡</div><div class="card-title">data.table</div><p class="card-desc">Lightning-fast processing of PLFS and NSS microdata — millions of rows in seconds with concise grouped aggregation syntax.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">fread()</span><span class="tag tag-dark">DT[i,j,by]</span></div></div>
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">🎨</div><div class="card-title">ggplot2 + ggiraph</div><p class="card-desc">Grammar-of-graphics charting for static publication output and interactive SVG tooltips for web reports.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">geom_*()</span><span class="tag tag-dark">girafe()</span></div></div>
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">📚</div><div class="card-title">Quarto</div><p class="card-desc">Single-source reproducible documents rendered to HTML, PDF, and Word — from blog posts to full 18-chapter textbooks.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">freeze</span><span class="tag tag-dark">listing</span></div></div>
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">🖥️</div><div class="card-title">Shiny</div><p class="card-desc">Interactive dashboards for GST trends, labour market analysis, and agricultural commodity price tracking.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">shinydashboard</span><span class="tag tag-dark">reactives</span></div></div>
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">📐</div><div class="card-title">gt + knitr</div><p class="card-desc">Publication-quality HTML and LaTeX tables with conditional formatting, colour scales, and source notes.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">gt()</span><span class="tag tag-dark">data_color()</span></div></div>
      <div class="card-dark"><div class="card-icon">🗂️</div><div class="card-title">patchwork</div><p class="card-desc">Compose complex multi-panel ggplot2 figures with custom layouts, shared legends, and annotation.</p><div class="tag-list"><span class="tag tag-dark">plot_layout()</span><span class="tag tag-dark">wrap_plots()</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section section-alt" style="text-align:center;">
  <div class="container-md" style="max-width:580px;">
    <span class="section-label">Available for Work</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Let's Collaborate</h2>
    <p class="section-desc" style="max-width:100%;margin:0 auto 2rem;">Open to survey research projects, data analysis consulting, academic support, and policy research collaborations across India.</p>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:.9rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="btn-hero-primary">✉️ pawanjangra1198@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="about.html" class="btn-hero-ghost" style="color:#1e293b;border-color:#e2e8f0;background:#fff;">View Profile</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
